name: tutor
description: Embed <Tutor> from @faraday-academy/tutor and a durable Vite + Nitro + Workflow server (author-editable api/ + workflows/). Grounded, Socratic, survives refreshes/timeouts. Needs AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY in .env.local locally; OIDC on Vercel.

appends.text:
# Tutor: flatten node_modules so the Workflow step bundler resolves ajv's
# dynamic requires in dev (nested .pnpm paths otherwise 500 the model step).
nodeLinker: hoisted

skill.loadWhen: the lesson should answer learner questions from its own content — a grounded, Socratic chat tutor beside the material
